title: U.S. Real Estate Opportunity Map
subtitle: Assumed demo data for the best U.S. cities to buy residential real estate.

balanced.label: Balanced
balanced.summary: Balances price momentum, yield, job growth, population growth, affordability, and supply tightness.

appreciation.label: Appreciation
appreciation.summary: Leans harder into recent trend, 5Y strength, and tighter supply.

cashflow.label: Cash flow
cashflow.summary: Favors yield, cheaper entry price, and more negotiable supply.

markets.summary: Momentum plus usable income. Strong all-around candidate for a watch list.
markets.rationale: Signals that stand out here: fast price momentum, strong job growth, population inflow. This is demo data meant for product exploration, not live investment advice.

markets.summary: Balanced fundamentals without one single metric dominating the story.
